notes: Cell 2020 supplementary workbook mmc2 contains DESeq2_NHBECells IFNB_L2FC/padj_IFNB for hIFNB treatment 4-12hrs; it is not separated into the 4h/6h/12h contrasts used in the derived-count pilot.

GEO provides raw count CSVs for HuhWT IFNa. The linked CMLS paper documents DESeq2 LRT and provides integrated gene-list supplements, but no full per-timepoint ranked IFNa DEG table matching this pilot.
